rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §39.0544 governs campus performance ratings and local accountability systems; it contains no provisions related to homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal values.
quote: The commissioner shall adopt rules regarding the assignment of campus performance ratings by school districts and open-enrollment charter schools.
_note: Rule text concerns accountability ratings only; no fiscal or tax-related provisions present. Indirect revenue effects on school funding are not addressed in this statute.
